---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? Why is this needed?

## Proposed Solution
How you think this should work. Include API changes, new endpoints, or behavior changes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Consensus Impact
Does this change require all nodes to upgrade simultaneously (hard fork)?
- [ ] Yes — consensus-critical change (GenesisConfig, block validation, UBI logic, verification)
- [ ] No — additive or non-breaking change

## Are you willing to implement this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, suggesting for someone else to pick up
